attribution: Data from Sarna BattleTechWiki (CC BY-NC-SA); miniatures by Catalyst Game Labs.
note: Interim dataset extracted from a July 2026 page capture; boxSets/packYears for catalog numbers 35700s/36000s/38000s (and select others) are ground-truth, hand-verified against the live Sarna wiki tables, with each pack a mini ships in listed separately. Entries with older or unmapped catalog numbers have an empty boxSets and fall back to the section-level boxSet.
